getActivePositions(uint256,uint256).details: Pagination prevents RPC payload bloat for production-scale usage.

params.limit: Maximum number of positions to return

returns.total: Total number of positions — used for pagination math

getHealthFactor(uint256).details: healthFactor = collateral / (prefunded * 0.8), expressed as basis points.      10000 = 100%. At-threshold = 8000 (80%).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.newTier: New leverage tier (must be less than current and > 0)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._gateway: Address of the deployed MetricoreGateway contract

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addPosition(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Adds a new mock position. Used by Seed.s.sol and InjectStress.s.sol.

getActivePositions(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns a paginated slice of active positions plus the total count.

getHealthFactor(uint256).notice: Returns the health factor for a specific position in basis points.

setPoolStats(uint256,uint256).notice: Overrides pool liquidity and borrow stats. Used by Seed/Stress scripts.

setPositionCollateral(uint256,uint256).notice: Overrides collateral of an existing position.         Used by InjectStress.s.sol to simulate price-drop scenarios.
